spec.objective: Wire the Codex subagent image default into the Helm chart and manager startup. Adds images.codexSubagent repository/tag/pullPolicy block to charts/tide/values.yaml (mirrors images.claudeSubagent). Adds CODEX_SUBAGENT_IMAGE env var to charts/tide/templates/deployment.yaml (mirrors CLAUDE_SUBAGENT_IMAGE pattern -- required= guard, bare-ref appVersion suffix). Adds codexSubagentImage helper to cmd/manager/env.go + env_test.go. Updates cmd/manager/main.go to read CODEX_SUBAGENT_IMAGE and stamp it onto ProviderDefaults.CodexImage (new field). Verification: helm template renders both CLAUDE_SUBAGENT_IMAGE and CODEX_SUBAGENT_IMAGE; make test green.
